swissarmyhammer-config/src/template_context.rs:795-821

Uncovered lines: 821, 850-851, 856-857, 862-863

```rust
fn set_available_skills_variable(&mut self)
```

Detects and sets the available_skills variable by scanning for skill directories. Uncovered: the end of the function and the Default/From trait impls (lines 850-863). Test: call set_available_skills_variable and verify the variable is set (even if empty array). The Default and From impls are trivial but should have basic smoke tests.
